title: ammi pumilum
intro: Ammi pumilum, also known as false Queen Anne's lace, is a flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ammi pumilum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Ammi pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
